crash.val: Opus 4.7/4.6 = 128k. Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5 = 64k. Batch with output-300k-2026-03-24 beta = 300k.
"Claude Code SDK" → "Claude Agent SDK". Task tool → Agent tool (v2.1.63). Both names coexist.
Custom slash commands merged into Skills. .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md canonical. Old .claude/commands/ still works.
New packaging unit. Bundle skills, agents, hooks, MCP, output styles. Distribute via marketplace, git URL, zip.
New top tier on Opus 4.7. Recommended default for coding/agentic.
4.6 / 4.7 / Mythos no longer support last-assistant-turn prefill. Use Structured Outputs / strict tools / XML.
output_config.format. No beta header. SDK helpers in Python (Pydantic), TS (Zod), Java. Incompatible with Citations.
memory_20250818, no beta header. Client-side, /memories backend, 6 commands.
compact-2026-01-12. Server summarizes; only Opus 4.7/4.6, Sonnet 4.6, Mythos.
Top-level cache_control: {type:'ephemeral'} auto-moves breakpoint to last cacheable block.
Opus 4.7/4.6, Sonnet 4.6: no beta, no premium pricing.
Skips local config (hooks/skills/plugins/MCP/auto-memory/CLAUDE.md). Recommended CI; future -p default.
Strictest mode: denies anything not in permissions.allow. Use for CI hardening.
v2.1.59+. Claude writes ~/.claude/projects/<repo>/memory/MEMORY.md alongside human-authored CLAUDE.md.
prompt and agent hook types: model/subagent evaluates the hook decision.
